raw_consumer_statement:
I wrote to formally dispute an unauthorized charge on my Citibank credit card and to request a thorough reinvestigation of this fraudulent transaction. 
Transaction Details Date : XX/XX/XXXX Amount : {$360.00} Merchant XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Card : XXXX Circumstances of the Fraud Neither my wife nor I have ever visited this XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX nor have we made any purchases from this retailer. At the time of this transaction : My physical credit card remained in my possession at all times My wife was traveling in XXXX ( I previously provided her flight documentation to verify her location ) Neither of us authorized this purchase I immediately contacted your fraud department upon discovering this charge and have made multiple attempts to resolve this matter. 
Response to Citibank 's Initial Decision Your fraud department rejected my dispute claim, stating that the transaction was processed using the card 's chip technology by an Authorized user, which is my wife. However, my wife was in XXXX, and I was working at that time, and the use of chip technology does not eliminate the possibility of fraud. Credit card chips can be compromised through : Skimming devices at compromised terminals Card cloning technology Data breaches at retailers Employee fraud at merchant locations
